news.headline: Singapore’s economy grows on back of AI boom, defying Iran war slowdown
news.summary:
Singapore’s economy expanded faster than expected in the first quarter as the global artificial-intelligence boom lifted the nation’s manufacturing and services, offsetting the drag from higher crude prices.

news.headline: Syria holds legislative elections in former Kurdish-controlled areas
news.summary: Al Jazeera’s Heidi Pett reports on the Syrian legislative elections in Hasakah and the town of Kobane.
